english translation text:
Ziarat of
Holy Prophet (saws)

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

Peace be upon you,
O Allah’s Messenger.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَبْدِٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Muhammad, the son of `Abdullah.

Peace be upon you,
O most preferred of Allah.

Peace be upon you,
O most-beloved of Allah.

Peace be upon you,
O choicest of Allah.

Peace be upon you,
O trustee of Allah.

I bear witness that you
are the messenger of Allah

and I bear witness that
you are Muhammad,
the son of `Abdullah.

And I bear witness that
you have truly well-wished for your nation,

striven hard in the way
of your Lord,
and worshipped Him until death came upon you.

May Allah reward you,
O Allah’s Messenger,

arabic text: اَفْضَلَ مَا جَزَىٰ نَبِيّاً عَنْ اُمَّتِهِ
english translation text:
with the best of that with which He has ever
rewarded a Prophet on behalf of his people.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمِّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمِّدٍ
english translation text:
O Allah, please send blessings to Muhammad
and the Household of Muhammad

arabic text: اَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰإِبْرَاهِيمَ وَآلِ إبرَاهِيمَ
english translation text: with the best blessings You have ever conferred upon Abraham and the Household of Abraham.
Verily, You are All-laudable, All-glorious.
